spots.name: Lake Woodlands
spots.parkingNotes: Best public bank access is Northshore Park (2505 Lake Woodlands Dr).
spots.description: Central 200-acre lake of The Woodlands. Catch-and-keep allowed. Kayak and SUP rentals at Riva Row and Lake's Edge boathouses.

spots.name: Lake Paloma
spots.parkingNotes: Paloma Point Park access. Pier and kayak/paddleboat rentals on site.
spots.description: Stocked community lake in Creekside Park. Catch-and-keep allowed.

spots.name: Bear Branch Reservoir
spots.parkingNotes: Enter via Lakeside Park, 5001 W. Alden Bridge Dr. Marshy banks — kayak recommended.
spots.restrictions: Game-warden patrolled. Verify TPWD license before fishing.
spots.description: Largest of the Township-managed lakes outside Lake Woodlands. Catch-and-keep allowed.

spots.name: Bear Branch Park Pond
spots.description: Neighborhood pond at Bear Branch Park.

spots.name: Rob Fleming Park Pond
spots.description: Family-friendly pond at Rob Fleming Park.

spots.name: Entry Lake (Cochran's Crossing)
spots.description: 3.3-acre village entry pond.

spots.name: Reedy Pond Park
spots.description: Neighborhood park pond in Indian Springs.

spots.name: Deer Rush Pond Park
spots.description: Small amenity pond.

spots.name: Hidden View Pond Park
spots.description: Quiet neighborhood pond.

spots.name: Southshore Park (Lake Woodlands south bank)
spots.parkingNotes: Shoulder parking on Woodlands Pkwy. Access to Lake Woodlands dam area.
spots.description: South-side access point for Lake Woodlands.

spots.name: Northshore Park (Lake Woodlands north bank)
spots.parkingNotes: 2505 Lake Woodlands Dr. Primary public bank-fishing access for Lake Woodlands.
spots.description: Park with the best public bank fishing on Lake Woodlands. Kayak put-in available.

spots.name: Riva Row / Hughes Landing (Waterway, west of Riva Row)
spots.parkingNotes: Riva Row Boat House; kayak/paddleboat rentals on site.
spots.restrictions: Fishing PROHIBITED east of Riva Row Boat House to I-45.
spots.description: Lower Waterway section connecting to Lake Woodlands. Fish only the western stretch.

spots.name: Creekwood Park Pond
spots.description: Hosts annual March fishing derby. Large catfish reported.

spots.name: Lake Harrison
spots.manager: Private (The Woodlands Resort / Grogan's Mill area)
spots.restrictions: Mostly private — very limited public bank access.
spots.description: Shown for awareness. Not recommended as a destination — most of the shoreline is commercial/private.

spots.name: W.G. Jones State Forest Ponds
spots.restrictions: State Forest (NOT a State Park) — license still required. Day-use only.
spots.description: Two small ponds in W.G. Jones State Forest. Family-friendly bank fishing.

spots.name: Spring Creek @ Pundt Park
spots.parkingNotes: 380-acre park; two stocked ponds plus creek bank access. Primitive canoe launch.
spots.description: Best Spring Creek access in the area. Spring white-bass run is the main draw.

spots.name: Spring Creek @ Jesse H. Jones Park
spots.parkingNotes: Jesse H. Jones Park & Nature Center.
spots.restrictions: Fishing allowed in Spring Creek ONLY. Park ponds are closed to fishing.
spots.description: Nature center on Spring Creek. Wade or kayak the creek itself.

spots.name: Spring Creek @ Collins Park
spots.parkingNotes: Near Spring Creek / Cypress Creek confluence area.
spots.description: Bank access along Spring Creek.

spots.name: Lake Conroe Park (FM 1097)
spots.parkingNotes: Public day-use park on FM 1097. Free boat ramp.
spots.restrictions: Largemouth bass: 16" minimum (vs. 14" statewide). 5-fish daily bag for all black bass combined. Grass carp catch-and-release only.
spots.description: Most popular public bank/ramp access on Lake Conroe.

spots.name: Scott's Ridge Recreation Area (Lake Conroe)
spots.parkingNotes: West side of Lake Conroe. Shaded bank fishing.
spots.restrictions: Same Lake Conroe special bass regs apply.
spots.description: Sam Houston National Forest recreation area on the west side of Lake Conroe.

spots.name: FM 830 Public Boat Ramp (Lake Conroe)
spots.parkingNotes: Two concrete ramps. Free public access. Near Willis.
spots.restrictions: Same Lake Conroe special bass regs apply.
spots.description: Free public boat ramp on the east side of Lake Conroe.

spots.name: Stubblefield Lake Recreation Area (Lake Conroe)
spots.parkingNotes: Two paved ramps. Small day-use fee.
spots.restrictions: Same Lake Conroe special bass regs apply.
spots.description: USFS recreation area at the north end of Lake Conroe.

spots.name: Alden Bridge Pond
spots.parkingNotes: Near 7725 Alden Bridge Dr (approximate). Upper and lower ponds with a spillway.
spots.description: Township park ponds in the Alden Bridge village.

spots.name: Alden Woods Pond
spots.description: Neighborhood Township park pond.

spots.name: Spindle Tree Ponds Park
spots.parkingNotes: Sterling Ridge village, near FM 2978 (west edge of box). Fishing plus jogging trail.
spots.description: Public park ponds on the western edge of The Woodlands.

spots.name: Kayak Ridge Pond Park
spots.description: Quiet natural-setting park pond in Creekside Park.

spots.name: Shenandoah Pond
spots.description: Township catch-and-release pond near Shenandoah.

spots.name: Marilyn Edgar Park Pond
spots.parkingNotes: 26531 S Hillside Dr, Oak Ridge North. Open 7am-10pm.
spots.description: Public city park pond in Oak Ridge North.

spots.name: Vision Park Pond
spots.parkingNotes: 149 Pine Forest Dr, Shenandoah. Half-mile loop trail around the pond. West of I-45.
spots.description: Public city park with a large pond and walking loop.

spots.name: Lake at Springwoods Village Nature Preserve
spots.parkingNotes: Morning Dove Bend trailhead, 77389. Gravel-lot trail access.
spots.restrictions: Alligators present — use caution. Southeast corner of the area near I-45 and the Grand Parkway.
spots.description: 150-acre nature preserve with public trail access and occasional fishing clinics.

spots.name: Benders Landing Estates Lakes
spots.restrictions: Residents and their guests only — not open to the public.
spots.description: Six community lakes including a roughly 72-acre main lake. Shown for awareness; residents-only.

spots.name: Auburn Lakes
spots.description: Three stocked community lakes. Shown for awareness; residents-only.

spots.name: Lake Holcomb (Falls at Imperial Oaks)
spots.restrictions: Residents only. Fishing dock and non-motorized boating for residents.
spots.description: 100-acre community lake. Shown for awareness; residents-only.

spots.name: Harmony Lake
spots.restrictions: Residents and guests only; non-resident access unconfirmed.
spots.description: Community amenity lake. Shown for awareness; treat as residents-only.

spots.name: Cypress Lake
spots.description: Township lake in the Alden Bridge village.

spots.name: Mystic Lake
spots.description: Township greenbelt lake in Cochran's Crossing.

spots.name: Forest Lake
spots.parkingNotes: Woodlands neighborhood pond, 77381 area (approximate — location not precisely pinned).
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. Roughly 20% of shoreline is publicly accessible; rest is private.
spots.description: Neighborhood lake with limited public bank access.

spots.name: Shadow Lake
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. Partial public bank access (~30-40%).
spots.description: Township lake/marsh in Cochran's Crossing.

spots.name: Shadowpoint Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Cochran's Crossing.

spots.name: Long Lake
spots.parkingNotes: 271 Split Rock Rd, 77381 (approximate). Street parking only.
spots.description: Township lake in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Hidden Lake Pond
spots.parkingNotes: 105 S Mill Trace Dr, 77381 (approximate). Concrete bank pad.
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Capstone Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Cochran's Crossing.

spots.name: Clover Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Cokeberry Pond
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. Limited bank access (~10%), partly gated.
spots.description: Township pond in Grogan's Mill; sparse fishing.

spots.name: Copper Sage Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Panther Creek.

spots.name: Kuykendahl Retention Pond
spots.description: Township retention pond in Panther Creek.

spots.name: Deepdale Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Alden Bridge.

spots.name: Evergreen Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond near Creekside/Indian Springs.

spots.name: Mason Pond
spots.description: Township park pond in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Meadow Lake Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Panther Creek.

spots.name: Marquise Oaks Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Indian Springs.

spots.name: Mel Killian Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Pastoral Pond
spots.description: Township park pond in the Grogan's Point/Grogan's Mill area.

spots.name: Pepperdale Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Sterling Ridge.

spots.name: Player Bend Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Sterling Ridge.

spots.name: Somerset Pond
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. Golf-course side posted No Fishing.
spots.description: Township pond in Panther Creek.

spots.name: Summer Cloud Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond near Alden Bridge.

spots.name: Tamarac Pond
spots.parkingNotes: Tamarac Park, off Woodlands Pkwy (approximate). Two ponds.
spots.description: Two Township park ponds at Tamarac Park.

spots.name: Terrace Mill Pond
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Sterling Ridge.

spots.name: Venture Tech Pond
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. Lower pond on a corporate campus; after-hours/weekend access.
spots.description: Pond on the Huntsman corporate campus in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Wedgewood Pond
spots.parkingNotes: 42 Wedgewood Forest Dr, 77381 (approximate). Street parking only.
spots.description: Township greenbelt pond in Grogan's Mill.

spots.name: Timberloch Lake (Lake Covey)
spots.parkingNotes: Executive office grounds near Town Center (approximate).
spots.restrictions: Catch-and-release only. On corporate office grounds; weekend access.
spots.description: Lake on executive office grounds near Town Center.

spots.name: Cranebrook Park Pond
spots.description: Township park pond with docks in Sterling Ridge.

spots.name: Kirkpatrick Glen Park Pond
spots.description: Township park pond in Sterling Ridge.

spots.name: Camellia Pond Park
spots.description: Township park pond in Creekside Park.

spots.name: Footbridge Way Pond Park
spots.description: Township park pond in Creekside Park.

spots.name: Hullwood Pond Park
spots.description: Township park pond in Creekside Park.

spots.name: Twin Ponds Park
spots.description: Township park with two ponds in Creekside Park.

spots.name: Lake Voyageur Pond Park
spots.description: Township park lake in Creekside Park.
